2604.13565.title: UHR-BAT: Budget-Aware Token Compression Vision-Language model for Ultra-High-Resolution Remote Sensing
2604.13565.paper_summary: Ultra-high-resolution (UHR) remote sensing imagery couples kilometer-scale context with query-critical evidence that may occupy only a few pixels. Such vast spatial scale leads to a quadratic explosion of visual tokens and hinders the extraction of information from small objects. Previous works utilize direct downsampling, dense tiling, or global top-k pruning, which either compromise query-critical image details or incur unpredictable compute. In this paper, we propose UHR-BAT, a query-guided and region-faithful token compression framework to efficiently select visual tokens under a strict context budget. Specifically, we leverage text-guided, multi-scale importance estimation for visual tokens, effectively tackling the challenge of achieving precise yet low-cost feature extraction. Furthermore, by introducing region-wise preserve and merge strategies, we mitigate visual token redundancy, further driving down the computational budget. Experimental results show that UHR-BAT achieves state-of-the-art performance across various benchmarks. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/UHR.
2604.13565.paper_summary_zh: 超高解析度 (UHR) 遙感影像結合了公里級的背景與可能僅佔幾個像素的查詢關鍵證據。如此廣泛的空間尺度導致視覺標記的平方級爆炸，並妨礙從小物體中提取信息。之前的研究利用直接下採樣、密集平鋪或全局 top-k 剪枝，這些方法要麼妥協查詢關鍵的影像細節，要麼產生不可預測的計算成本。在本文中，我們提出了 UHR-BAT，一個查詢引導和區域忠實的標記壓縮框架，以在嚴格的背景預算下有效選擇視覺標記。具體而言，我們利用文本引導的多尺度重要性估計來處理視覺標記，有效應對實現精確且低成本特徵提取的挑戰。此外，通過引入區域保留和合併策略，我們減少了視覺標記的冗餘，進一步降低了計算預算。實驗結果表明，UHR-BAT 在各種基準測試中達到了最先進的性能。代碼將在 https://github.com/Yunkaidang/UHR 上提供。
2604.13565.author: Yunkai Dang et.al.
2604.13565.authors: Yunkai Dang, Minxin Dai, Yuekun Yang, Zhangnan Li, Wenbin Li, Feng Miao, Yang Gao
